sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Arch Capital stock rating reiterated at Market Outperform by Citizens
feed.summary: Citizens analysts have reiterated a Market Outperform rating on Arch Capital (NASDAQ:ACGL) with an 18% upside price target, citing the company's strong balance sheet and effective risk management. This assessment is supported by InvestingPro data highlighting Arch Capital's "Great" financial health and solid Altman Z-Score. The firm advises investors to focus on companies with strong balance sheets and diversified earnings streams, particularly those with longer-duration portfolios that benefit from rising interest rates, placing Arch Capital among its recommended selections.

feed.title: United States Treatment-Resistant Depression Market to grow
feed.summary: The United States Treatment-Resistant Depression Market is projected to grow at a high CAGR from 2024 to 2031, driven by novel therapies, neuromodulation, and personalized medicine. Key players like Pfizer, Viatris, Novartis, AbbVie, Eli Lilly, Otsuka, and AstraZeneca are advancing pharmacological treatments and innovative approaches. The report segments the market by drugs, route of administration, and distribution channels, with North America holding the largest share due to high prevalence and strong healthcare infrastructure.
